subject: docs(todo): re-validate per-repo TODOs via 10 parallel agents
body:
Spawned 10 parallel Explore agents (one per repo) against live GitHub
state to verify per-repo TODO items in docs/TODO.md. Applied deltas:

- canva-grid fully resolved (Triggers replacement done: 8 group tables
  + meta sweeps + reflective passes + name collisions note). Section
  removed.
- budgy-ting fully resolved (Triggers done, tripwire test added at
  src/iconCacheBust.test.ts, 151 lines). Section removed.
  Gap Matrix: ICON_CACHE_BUST Partial -> Pass.
- few-lap DEBUG_SYSTEM (all 6 items) and THEME_DARK_MODE fully done;
  Triggers partial (8 group tables present but missing Meta sweeps +
  Reflective passes tables); debug comment text has shifted but leak
  risk persists. Gap Matrix: DEBUG_SYSTEM + THEME_DARK_MODE Partial
  -> Pass.
- graphiki ICON_CACHE_BUST tripwire test added at
  src/test/icon-cache-bust.test.ts; user communication still missing.
- four-ems correction: earlier claim that 30-second suppression was
  present was wrong — usePWAUpdate.ts has only a 3-second offline-ready
  dismissal. Item added back to PWA_SYSTEM list and cross-cutting gap
  updated.
- repo-tor, model-pear, see-veo, sun-sea-o, synctone: no progress
  since 2026-04-17 — all items remain valid. Preamble claims verified.

Updated Gap Matrix, audit header, and Cross-Cutting Gaps summary.

Tags: documentation, audit, todo, cross-fleet
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
